title: RHG PVP resource pack
description: This resource pack adds the textures from the newer Minecraft textires. Not all textures are 512x most are 16x. This resource pack is made for fps. It doesn't make a difference in FPS when using default minecraft textures or using my resource pack. Please
body:
This resource pack adds the textures from the newer Minecraft textires. Not all textures are 512x most are 16x. This resource pack is made for FPS. It doesn't make a difference in FPS when using default minecraft textures or using my resource pack. Please support me and my socials.
